offerIntroVariants: The roads outside town are crawling with {primaryTargetNamePlural}.
We've had too many sightings of {primaryTargetNamePlural} near the gates.
offerDetailVariants: Head out and {objectiveSummary} before they reach the walls.
acceptVariants: Good. {objectiveSummaryCapitalized}, then report back to me.
Excellent. {objectiveSummaryCapitalized} and return for your reward.
That's settled. {objectiveSummaryCapitalized} before the townsfolk panic.
completeVariants: Well done. Those {primaryTargetNamePlural} won't trouble the town for a while.
Excellent work. You've made the roads safer already.
The guards will be glad to hear the job is done.

offerIntroVariants: Our crafters need fresh materials from the dead.
The apothecary has asked for supplies only the undead can provide.
There's useful salvage to be had from the skeletons outside town.
offerDetailVariants: Bring me what we need by doing the following: {objectiveSummary}.
acceptVariants: Good. {objectiveSummaryCapitalized}. Prefarmed supplies will do nicely too.
Excellent. {objectiveSummaryCapitalized} and bring them straight back.
inProgressVariants: Come back when you've finished gathering everything.
completeVariants: Exactly what we needed. These {primaryItemNamePlural} will not go to waste.
Perfect. The town's crafters will make good use of these materials.
Excellent haul. You've kept our stores supplied.

offerIntroVariants: I need eyes on the approaches to town.
We can never have too much reconnaissance.
Someone needs to check the nearby routes.
offerDetailVariants: Take a look at the route and {objectiveSummary}.
acceptVariants: Good. {objectiveSummaryCapitalized} and let me know what you see.
Fine. {objectiveSummaryCapitalized}; I want a fresh report.
inProgressVariants: The scouting report is still missing.
Return only after you've reached the marked area.
completeVariants: Good work. Fresh scouting keeps everyone alive.
Excellent. Reliable reports are worth their weight in copper.
That information will help us plan our next move.

offerIntroVariants: The cooks are short on fresh meat and the outskirts are thick with skittish game.
We need hunters more than heroes for this one.
The camp stores could use a proper hunting run.
offerDetailVariants: Bring in supplies the hard way and {objectiveList}.
acceptVariants: Good. {objectiveListCapitalized}, then bring the haul back here.
Fine. {objectiveListCapitalized}; the town can use every scrap.
Excellent. {objectiveListCapitalized} and we'll keep the stores full.
inProgressVariants: Keep after the game and finish the assignment.
The hunters are still waiting on you. {objectiveListCapitalized}.
completeVariants: Excellent haul. That's the kind of work that keeps a town fed.
Well done. Fresh game and good fieldwork in one run.
Perfect. The cooks and tanners will both be pleased.

offerIntroVariants: Repairs and fieldworks chew through timber and stone faster than you'd think.
The quartermaster needs proper gathered materials, not scavenged scraps.
We're building up stores for the crews outside town.
offerDetailVariants: Bring back what we need by doing this: {objectiveList}.
acceptVariants: Good. {objectiveListCapitalized}. Prefarmed supplies count if they're clean.
Excellent. {objectiveListCapitalized}, then bring the lot back here.
inProgressVariants: We're still short on gathered supplies.
Come back when the materials are in hand. {objectiveListCapitalized}.
completeVariants: Perfect. That's exactly the sort of supply haul we needed.
Excellent work. Timber and ore keep this town standing.
Well gathered. The crews will put all of this to use.

offerIntroVariants: I have a larger campaign in mind if you're ready for real work.
The town needs more than a simple errand this time.
We need someone capable of handling a full field assignment.
offerDetailVariants: Your orders are simple, if not easy: {objectiveList}.
I need all of this done before I can call the roads secure: {objectiveList}.
acceptVariants: Then let's begin. {objectiveListCapitalized}, and return only when the whole job is done.
Good. {objectiveListCapitalized}; that's the scale of work I expect from a seasoned adventurer.
Excellent. {objectiveListCapitalized}, and the town will remember it.
inProgressVariants: Return to the field and finish the assignment: {objectiveList}.
completeVariants: Outstanding work. That's the kind of effort that changes the whole frontier.
Excellent. You've cut down the threats and stocked our stores in one stroke.
Impressive. Few adventurers can manage a campaign that broad.
